privacy.metaDescription: How Mohtaoua collects, uses and protects your personal data when you visit our site or submit a contact request.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy

sections.title: Data controller
paragraphs: Mohtaoua, located at Lotissement Attaoufik, Millenium, Zénith, Casablanca 20270 (Morocco), is responsible for processing data collected through this website and the contact form.
Contact: contact@mohtaoua.ma — Tel. +212 694-615342
Legal identifiers (ICE, trade register, legal form): available on request at contact@mohtaoua.ma.

sections.title: Data we collect
paragraphs: Via the contact form: name, email, phone, organization, media budget and message.
Technical data: IP address, browser type, pages viewed and timestamps, logged by our hosting provider for security and operation.
Cookie preference: your choice (accept / decline) is stored locally in your browser (localStorage).

sections.title: Purposes
paragraphs: Respond to audit, quote or information requests.
Ensure site security and maintenance.
Comply with legal and accounting obligations.

sections.title: Legal basis and retention
paragraphs: Processing is based on your consent (form) and Mohtaoua's legitimate interest (site security).
Contact data: kept for up to 3 years after the last business exchange, unless a longer period is required by law.
Technical logs: kept for up to 12 months.

sections.title: Subprocessors
paragraphs: Vercel Inc. (United States) — website hosting and delivery.
Resend Inc. (United States) — sending emails from the contact form.
These providers process data only on our behalf under contractual data protection measures.

sections.title: Transfers outside Morocco
paragraphs: Hosting and email delivery may involve transfers to servers outside Morocco (including the United States). We ensure appropriate safeguards are in place.

sections.title: Security
paragraphs: We implement reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect your information (HTTPS, restricted access, certified providers).

sections.title: Your rights
paragraphs: Under Moroccan law n° 09-08 on personal data protection, you may request access, correction or deletion of your data.
To exercise your rights: contact@mohtaoua.ma. You may also lodge a complaint with the CNDP (Morocco's data protection authority).

terms.metaDescription: Terms of use for the Mohtaoua website and general framework for our digital services.
terms.title: Terms of Use

sections.title: Purpose
paragraphs: The site presents Mohtaoua's digital services: marketing, web, software, design and automation for businesses across all industries in Morocco.

sections.title: Services and quotes
paragraphs: Deliverables (paid advertising, content creation, automation, landing pages, etc.) are subject to a separate written quote or contract.
Prices shown on the site are indicative and may change. Media budgets are generally billed separately by platforms (Meta, Google, TikTok).

sections.title: Published results and content
paragraphs: Figures, screenshots, case studies and testimonials are illustrative or based on real anonymized client work.
Performance (leads, CPL, ROAS) varies by sector, budget, seasonality and training offer quality. No results are guaranteed without a specific contract.
Client names may be anonymized or replaced with generic labels when public citation is not authorized.

sections.title: Intellectual property
paragraphs: Site texts, visuals, logos and content belong to Mohtaoua or its clients and are protected.
Any reproduction or extraction without written permission is prohibited.

sections.title: Liability
paragraphs: Mohtaoua strives to keep information accurate but does not guarantee error-free or uninterrupted service.
The site may be modified or interrupted for maintenance without notice.

sections.title: External links
paragraphs: The site may link to third-party sites (social networks, YouTube). Mohtaoua is not responsible for their content or privacy practices.

sections.title: Governing law
paragraphs: These terms are governed by Moroccan law. Disputes fall under the competent courts of Casablanca.

cookies.metaDescription: Information about cookies and trackers used on the Mohtaoua website.
cookies.title: Cookie Policy

sections.title: What is a cookie?
paragraphs: A cookie is a small file stored on your device when you visit a website. It helps remember preferences or, where applicable, measure traffic.

sections.title: Cookies and storage on this site
paragraphs: Essential cookies / storage: language, display theme (light/dark) and your cookie banner choice (localStorage).
Analytics: Google Tag Manager (Google Ireland Limited) is enabled only if you accept cookies via the banner. It may load Google Analytics (G-F58Z3G6GFF) to measure traffic and site usage.
Third-party cookies: embedded YouTube videos may set cookies when you start playback. Social links open third-party sites with their own policies.

sections.title: Managing preferences
paragraphs: Via the banner: you can accept or decline non-essential cookies.
Via your browser: you can delete cookies and localStorage at any time. Some features (language, theme) may reset.

sections.title: Contact
paragraphs: Cookie-related questions: contact@mohtaoua.ma
